emails.subject: CPUC Workshop on 4/17
emails.body: good question. They may be anticipating a lengthy presentation by the LDC's that answers the questions posed on the notice. I just sent you what I propose TW should handout. Look over and let me know what you think. It's short, only 8 pages. I thought brevity would be refreshing. Thanks, dude. Have a great Easter weekend. Jeff To: Fawcett, Jeffery
